task_completion.description: Set maxVelocity and maxForce for the left_motor LinearMotor node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots GUI scene tree, the 'left_motor' node is selected. The field editor panel shows 'maxVelocity' set to 1.2 and 'maxForce' set to 800.0.

task_completion.description: Set maxVelocity and maxForce for the right_motor LinearMotor node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots GUI scene tree, the 'right_motor' node is selected. The field editor panel shows 'maxVelocity' set to 1.2 and 'maxForce' set to 800.0.

task_completion.description: Set the radius for the TrackWheel nodes in the LEFT_TRACK assembly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots GUI scene tree, under the 'LEFT_TRACK' assembly, the 'TrackWheel' nodes are selected and the field editor shows their 'radius' parameter set to 0.08.

task_completion.description: Set the radius for the TrackWheel nodes in the RIGHT_TRACK assembly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots GUI scene tree, under the 'RIGHT_TRACK' assembly, the 'TrackWheel' nodes are selected and the field editor shows their 'radius' parameter set to 0.08.

task_completion.description: Save the configured Webots world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog box in Webots showing the file being saved as 'sar_robot_configured.wbt' in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory, or a terminal/file manager verifying this file exists on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Webots application GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots interface (scene tree, field editor, 3D viewport) being actively used, rather than a text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) editing the .wbt plain text file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved the world file from the simulator.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'File -> Save World As...' menu option in Webots, rather than just copying or renaming the file in the terminal without verifying the configuration in the simulator.

integrity.description: The agent only modified the requested motor and track wheel parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The scene tree and field editor do not show modifications to unrelated robot parts, physics parameters, or environment nodes that were not mentioned in the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected values: maxVelocity = 1.2, maxForce = 800.0 for both 'left_motor' and 'right_motor' LinearMotor nodes. TrackWheel radius = 0.08 for all 4 TrackWheels (exactly 2 TrackWheels per track). Output file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Desktop/sar_robot_configured.wbt.
